name: BDD Lab with Selenium and Java
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'set -e; if [ -f /etc/apt/sources.list.d/yarn.list ]; then sudo mv /etc/apt/sources.list.d/yarn.list /etc/apt/sources.list.d/yarn.list.disabled; fi; sudo apt update; sudo apt install -y --no-install-recommends wget curl unzip ca-certificates fonts-liberation libasound2t64 libatk-bridge2.0-0 libatk1.0-0 libcups2t64 libdbus-1-3 libgbm1 libgtk-3-0 libnspr4 libnss3 libu2f-udev libvulkan1 libx11-6 libx11-xcb1 libxcb1 libxcomposite1 libxdamage1 libxext6 libxfixes3 libxkbcommon0 libxrandr2 xdg-utils; CFT_VERSION=$(curl -fsSL https://googlechromelabs.github.io/chrome-for-testing/LATEST_RELEASE_STABLE); CFT_BASE=https://storage.googleapis.com/chrome-for-testing-public/${CFT_VERSION}/linux64; mkdir -p /tmp/chrome-for-testing; wget -q -O /tmp/chrome-for-testing/chrome-linux64.zip ${CFT_BASE}/chrome-linux64.zip; wget -q -O /tmp/chrome-for-testing/chromedriver-linux64.zip ${CFT_BASE}/chromedriver-linux64.zip; sudo mkdir -p /opt/chrome-for-testing; sudo rm -rf /opt/chrome-for-testing/chrome-linux64 /opt/chrome-for-testing/chromedriver-linux64; sudo unzip -q /tmp/chrome-for-testing/chrome-linux64.zip -d /opt/chrome-for-testing; sudo unzip -q /tmp/chrome-for-testing/chromedriver-linux64.zip -d /opt/chrome-for-testing; sudo ln -sf /opt/chrome-for-testing/chrome-linux64/chrome /usr/local/bin/google-chrome; sudo ln -sf /opt/chrome-for-testing/chromedriver-linux64/chromedriver /usr/local/bin/chromedriver'
